ops.body: Live verification 2026-07-14, partial: providers diff DONE (256 live codes captured; 14 seed corrections + 13 programs confirmed absent from AW auto-update — AA/Delta/United/BA/AFKLM/SAS/Etihad/Ethiopian/Finnair/Frontier/Choice/Wyndham/CapitalOne stay browser-lane; corrections being applied to registry + client envelope fix). pull shape-validated: connectedUser list uses a connectedUsers envelope (client fix in flight); user detail flat. BLOCKED on user sharing accounts: connected user has accountsIndex empty, zero accounts shared, so balance rows and /account/{id} envelope remain unverifiable. Refresh e2e still pending skills rewiring.
